---
title: "Unit 1: Operations"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
---

## 🎯 Learning Targets
{{< include alg-u1-ope-learning-targets.qmd >}}

## 🗂️ Recall: Formula Card
{{< include Alg-u1-ope-formulas.qmd >}}

## 📝 Practice Problems

::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

{{< include alg-u1-ope-ex/alg-u1-ope-easy-ex-01.qmd >}}

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

{{< include alg-u1-ope-ex/alg-u1-ope-easy-ex-02.qmd >}}
::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::
{{< include alg-u1-ope-ex/alg-u1-ope-easy-ex-03.qmd >}}
::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::
{{< include alg-u1-ope-ex/alg-u1-ope-easy-ex-04.qmd >}}

### 🟡 Medium

{{< include alg-u1-ope-ex/alg-u1-ope-hard-ex-01.qmd >}}
::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::
{{< include alg-u1-ope-ex/alg-u1-ope-hard-ex-02.qmd >}}
::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::
### 🔴 Challenging

{{< include alg-u1-ope-ex/alg-u1-ope-adv-ex-01.qmd >}}
:::

## ⚡ Test Your Knowledge {#sec-ope-worksheet}

{{< include dynamic_exercises_qmd/fractions_additions.qmd >}}
